questions.question: What is the primary difference between a public cloud, private cloud and hybrid cloud, in terms of security and data control? (15 marks)
A cloud provider stores sensitive data in a region with inadequate data protection laws. Which of the following security controls could mitigate this risk? (10 marks)
An organization stores sensitive customer data in a cloud storage bucket that is publicly accessible. What is the potential consequence of this action on the organization's privacy? (5 marks)
